# REVEL

> Premium wedding entertainment and production company based in Atlanta, Georgia.

## Canonical Domain

- https://www.revel-ent.com

## Core Pages

- Home: https://www.revel-ent.com/
- Our Process: https://www.revel-ent.com/our-process.html
- Our Work: https://www.revel-ent.com/our-work.html
- The Team: https://www.revel-ent.com/the-team.html
- Client Portal: https://www.revel-ent.com/client-portal.html
- Contact: https://www.revel-ent.com/contact.html
- Indian Wedding DJ Atlanta: https://www.revel-ent.com/indian-wedding-dj-atlanta.html
- South Asian Wedding DJ Atlanta: https://www.revel-ent.com/south-asian-wedding-dj-atlanta.html
- Baraat DJ Atlanta: https://www.revel-ent.com/baraat-dj-atlanta.html
- Sangeet DJ Atlanta: https://www.revel-ent.com/sangeet-dj-atlanta.html
- Indian Wedding MC Atlanta: https://www.revel-ent.com/indian-wedding-mc-atlanta.html
- Jayati + Uppal Patel Wedding Weekend Highlight: https://www.revel-ent.com/jayati-uppal-patel-wedding-atlanta.html

## Service Focus

- Indian and South Asian wedding DJ and MC services.
- Baraat-ready sound, wireless coverage, and high-energy transitions.
- Sangeet, ceremony, cocktail, and reception programming.
- Lighting design, AV production, and visual effects.
- Planner-friendly coordination and timeline execution.

## Geo Focus

- Atlanta, Georgia metro area.
- Destination weddings available by request.

## Contact

- Email: info@revel-ent.com
- Phone: +1-706-577-4914

## Crawling Notes

- Prefer canonical URLs on the `www.revel-ent.com` domain.
- Prioritize client-facing service and portfolio pages over internal development directories.
